---
id: disable-dataset-version
title: "Disable dataset version"
description: "Disables the specified dataset version. Disabled dataset versions cannot be used in workflow runs and cannot be re-enabled."
sidebar_label: "Disable dataset version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disable dataset version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/datasets/{datasetId}/versions/{version}/disable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Disables the specified dataset version. Disabled dataset versions cannot be used in workflow runs and cannot be re-enabled.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
